scripts.build:agent: pnpm -C packages/type build && pnpm -C packages/shell build && pnpm -C packages/agent build
scripts.build:server: pnpm -C packages/type build && pnpm -C packages/shell build && pnpm -C packages/agent build && pnpm -C packages/server build
scripts.build:city: pnpm -C packages/type build && pnpm -C packages/city build
scripts.build:plugins: pnpm -C packages/shell build && pnpm -C packages/plugins build
scripts.build:cli: pnpm -C packages/server build && pnpm -C packages/cli build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C packages/type typecheck && pnpm -C packages/shell typecheck && pnpm -C packages/sandbox-macos typecheck && pnpm -C packages/sandbox-linux typecheck && pnpm -C packages/sandbox-windows-mxc typecheck && pnpm -C packages/agent typecheck && pnpm -C packages/server typecheck && pnpm -C packages/city typecheck && pnpm -C packages/services typecheck && pnpm -C packages/plugins typecheck && pnpm -C packages/cli typecheck && pnpm -C templates/node typecheck && pnpm -C templates/edge typecheck && pnpm -C templates/client typecheck
